speaker: Argo
text: Hello, Lord Scheat.

speaker: Scheat
text: Finally! You have arrived, Argo!

speaker: Scheat
text: Come, come! Keep me company and help pass the time.

speaker: Argo
text: Sure, I’d be glad to.

speaker: Argo
text: We have exams coming up.

speaker: Scheat
text: So I see. Students are always so busy this time of year.

speaker: Scheat
text: I too would like to take some kind of test at least once.

speaker: Argo
text: You’re a being that makes tests, not take them. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: And I say that’s boring… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I won't be able to see you much during the exam period.

speaker: Scheat
text: I understand. It seems one of them will take place outside the college anyways.

speaker: Argo
text: Huh? It will?

speaker: Scheat
text: Oh, did you not know?

speaker: Argo
text: This is the first time I’ve heard of it…

speaker: Scheat
text: *A gentle sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: ...Just pretend you did not hear that. *

speaker: Argo
text: (He sure can be careless for someone called "Lord" Scheat…)

speaker: Scheat
text: Even if you are busy studying, you will still take baths, right? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Of course I will.

speaker: Scheat
text: Then take me with you! We can talk all we want there.

speaker: Argo
text: Okay, I’ll invite you next time then.

speaker: Scheat
text: You will invite me and no one else! Understood!?

speaker: Argo
text: I—I understand.

speaker: Scheat
text: Good.

speaker: Scheat
text: By the way, do they take baths in your village? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Y-Yeah, of course they do.

speaker: Scheat
text: Is it like the baths here? Does everyone get in together? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text:
No, there aren't any public baths in the country.
Everyone has a bathroom in their house.

speaker: Argo
text: But every once in a while I’d stay at a friend’s house and get in with them.

speaker: Scheat
text: Ah... That must be nice... It sounds fun... *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: I too would like to experience such worldly activities at least once.

speaker: Argo
text: Lord Scheat... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: ...If it’s all right with you, would you like to have a sleepover in your room someday?

speaker: Scheat
text: *A strange glow emanates from the artifact.*

speaker: Scheat
text: But of course! Any time you want! You are more than welcome! *paw prints*

speaker: Argo
text: Okay, I’ll come over one of these days.

speaker: Argo
text: Um... Your body sure is a lot smoother than ours.

speaker: Scheat
text: Oh? Does it bother you? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: It had a strange sensation when you were feeling me that one time. *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: Then would you like to see it feels again? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Is that okay? *concerned expression*

speaker: Scheat
text: I too enjoy being touched by you mortals with your soft, fluffy hands. It is quite pleasant. *

speaker: Argo
text: Heh heh heh... Well, then...
Lord Scheat allows me to touch his body all I want.

speaker: Scheat
text: Mmm... I am the one usually doing the touching,... but being touched is... quite ticklish.... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Should I stop? *sigh*

speaker: Scheat
text: No... I like it... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: O-Okay.

speaker: I feel his arms from the wrists to their shoulders.
text: Then, his neck and chest. *sigh*
I can tell from doing this that the structure of his body is... somewhat different.

speaker: Scheat
text: Mmmf... That feels nice...
He has a relaxed expression on his face. Touching his smooth skin feels same for me.

speaker: Argo
text: "I... I don't know what to say." *sigh*
Lord Scheat... is a dragon... So what’s the lower half of his body like? *sigh*
“Does... he even have a gender? He is a man, right?”
So what about his you-know-what...? What's it like...?

speaker: Argo
text: "I... I don't know what to say." *sigh*
...I’m tempted to find out while pretending I'm teasing him a little. I just have to know.

speaker: Argo
text: (...J-Just a bit won't hurt...)
I go for it and try to work my hand under his clothes.

speaker: Scheat
text: Uh...

speaker: Argo
text: Ah-
But then he catches my hand and prevents me from going any further.

speaker: Scheat
text: You are surprisingly lecherous. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: P-Please forgive me...

speaker: Scheat
text: Trying to sneak something past a dragon... How amusing. *

speaker: Argo
text: (...Huh? So does that mean he’s not mad?) *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (...What should I do?) *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Sorry, but I have to go soon.

speaker: Scheat
text: All right, it was enjoyable while it lasted.

speaker: Argo
text: I’m glad to hear it.
